mapper.select: SELECT s.student_id AS id, s.student_no AS studentNo, s.student_name AS name, s.clazz_no AS clazzNo, c.memo AS clazzName, s.state AS state, s.error_count AS errorCount, s.ip AS ip, s.avatar AS avatar, s.create_time AS createTime FROM t_student s LEFT JOIN t_clazz c ON s.clazz_no = c.no WHERE s.student_no = #{studentNo} LIMIT 1
